2393530.name: Fantasy Grounds - G.I. JOE Roleplaying Game Operation Cold Iron Adventure
2393530.description:
G.I. JOE Roleplaying Game Operation Cold Iron Adventure

Picking up where Emerald Oubliette leaves off, this four-part adventure takes 3-6 G.I. JOE characters from level 2 all the way up to level 6.  This world trotting adventure takes your squad from the fiery deserts of Addis Ababa to the frozen plateaus of Siberia.
Get behind the wheel of classic G.I. JOE vehicles like the Polar Battle Bear and the Snow Cat, facing off against iconic Cobra tech like the H.I.S.S. Tank and S.N.A.K.E. Armor.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Kevin Heffernan
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the G.I. Joe RPG ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
